articles.title: What Sam Kennedy said of Jason Varitek’s future with the Red Sox
articles.description:
“He’s got a very bright future in the game. And hopefully it’ll be here with the Red Sox for the long term.”

The post What Sam Kennedy said of Jason Varitek’s future with the Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sam Kennedy praises Jason Varitek's potential future with the Red Sox.
Kennedy expresses hope for Varitek's long-term role with the team.
Varitek's future could influence coaching decisions impacting Boston's baseball community.

articles.title: Former Celtics star Isaiah Thomas hired by Boston as a pro, college scout
articles.description:
Thomas, 37, will reportedly serve as a scout for the Celtics while based out of Seattle.

The post Former Celtics star Isaiah Thomas hired by Boston as a pro, college scout appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Isaiah Thomas, 37, hired as a pro and college scout for the Celtics.
Thomas will work remotely from Seattle, enhancing scouting efforts for Boston.
His return strengthens local ties and boosts community engagement with the Celtics.

articles.title: Supreme Court preserves access to widely used abortion pill, while lawsuit plays out
articles.description:
The court’s order allows women seeking abortions to continue obtaining the drug, mifepristone, at pharmacies or through the mail, without an in-person visit to a doctor.

The post Supreme Court preserves access to widely used abortion pill, while lawsuit plays out appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Supreme Court allows continued access to mifepristone for Boston women seeking abortions.
Women can obtain the drug via pharmacies or mail without in-person doctor visits.
Access to mifepristone remains crucial amid ongoing legal challenges affecting reproductive rights.

articles.title: This play from Drake Maye’s rookie season continues to stand out to new Patriots safety
articles.description:
“My teammates in Tennessee, we talked about that play all the time, how long we ran around."

summary: New Patriots safety Mike Brown recalls a standout play from Drake Maye's rookie season.
Brown's teammates in Tennessee frequently discussed the play's impressive execution.
This highlights the Patriots' focus on learning from standout performances in the NFL.

articles.title: Worcester man goes viral for performance protesting potholes at city council meeting
articles.description:
"I just wanted to do something different. The performance was off the top of my head."

summary: Worcester resident performed at city council meeting to protest potholes on May 14.

Residents may see increased pressure on city officials to address pothole repairs.
